AVG_RISK_SCORE_PCTL (Report) National percentile value for average risk score Percentile of practice's average beneficiary CMS-HCC risk score 1327 Num 8
AVG_RISK_SCORE_75_PCTL CMS-HCC risk score is at or above the national 75th percentile Indicator for whether practice's average beneficiary CMS-HCC risk score is at or above the 75th percentile of beneficiaries nationwide. Used as part of criteria for determining practice’s
